assumptions: No Daily domain or API key exists.
A terminal with cURL is available.

developer_goal: Create a Daily account, obtain an API key, create a room with cURL, and open the room URL.

first_success.outcome: POST /rooms returns a room url and opening that URL loads the Daily Prebuilt call UI.
first_success.observable_signal: cURL returns JSON including url; visiting the url shows the Prebuilt video call interface.

route_selection.surface: Daily room via cURL REST API then Prebuilt room URL
route_selection.rule: Measure documented developer onboarding: account creation through first success. Prefer the vendor quickstart or hosted API/console path when one exists.
route_selection.selected: Daily room via cURL REST API then Prebuilt room URL

candidates.name: Daily room via cURL REST API then Prebuilt room URL
candidates.reason: Daily Prebuilt is the Start-here embed path once a room URL exists. Rooms can be created via dashboard or REST API; REST docs demonstrate cURL with Authorization Bearer to https://api.daily.co/v1/rooms. Prefer cURL room create, then open the returned url for Prebuilt.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to a Daily account and open the dashboard.
Copy a Daily API key from the dashboard.
required_path.observable_result: Key value available for Authorization header.

required_path.action: Open the returned room url in a browser.
required_path.observable_result: Prebuilt call UI loads for the room.

prerequisites.description: Daily API key for Authorization Bearer.

sources.title: Embed video chat quickly with Daily Prebuilt
evidence_supported: Create room via dashboard or REST API

uncertainties.question: Are all signup and first-success fields for Daily fully enumerated in public docs?
uncertainties.impact: Atomic field counts inside account or billing steps may be incomplete.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Live console fields can differ from documentation screenshots.
